venues.name: Ann Arbor YMCA
venues.address: 400 W Washington St, Ann Arbor, MI 48103
venues._hours_note: Downtown branch (400 W Washington St). Hours preserved from last confirmed fetch. Primary fitness facility during Ann Arbor stay. Highly recommended all week given Extreme Heat Warning.

venues.name: University of Michigan Museum of Art
venues.address: 525 S State St, Ann Arbor, MI 48109
venues._hours_note: Free admission always. Closed Mondays. Extended hours Fridays until 8 PM. Closed July 4 (Friday).

current_exhibitions.title: Zina Saro-Wiwa: Table Manners (Season 1)
current_exhibitions.description: Digital displays exploring themes of identity and cultural practice by British-Nigerian artist Zina Saro-Wiwa.

current_exhibitions.title: American Sampler: Activating the Archive
current_exhibitions.description: Archival materials from UMMA's collection re-examined through a contemporary curatorial lens.

current_exhibitions.title: We Write To You About Africa
current_exhibitions.description: Celebration of African voices and narratives through works from the permanent collection and on loan.

current_exhibitions.title: Jaume Plensa: Behind the Walls
current_exhibitions.description: Large-scale monumental white head sculpture by the internationally recognized Spanish artist, installed on the UMMA exterior.

events.title: Regular gallery admission — free
events.description: Free admission to all galleries. UMMA closed July 4 (Friday). Extended hours Fridays until 8 PM. An artist talk is scheduled for September 17 — no July-specific events confirmed on site.

venues.name: The Ark
venues.address: 316 S Main St, Ann Arbor, MI 48104
venues._hours_note: Concert venue — open only for events, typically doors 1 hour before showtime. Check individual event pages.

events.title: Blake Whyte
events.description: Soul/theatre songwriter-actor — theatrical storytelling through music.

events.title: Open Stage
events.description: 8-minute open mic slots. Free for students/members.

events.title: Davy Knowles
events.description: Blues-rock guitarist from the Isle of Man — cult favorite with serious chops.

events.title: Black Joe Lewis & The Honeybears
events.description: Texas blues and soul guitarist with the high-energy Honeybears band.

events.title: Howie Day
events.description: Singer-songwriter with emotionally resonant lyrics. Special guest Max Bartos.

events.title: The James Hunter Six
events.description: GRAMMY-nominated British soul artist — timeless rhythm & soul. Special guest McKinley James.

events.title: Lucy Wainwright Roche
events.description: Folk performer with a bell-tone voice; daughter of Loudon Wainwright III and Suzzy Roche.

events.title: Summer Sounds: Schmaltz & Jill Jack
events.description: Free outdoor Summer Sounds concert during the Ann Arbor Art Fair.

events.title: Summer Sounds: The Rupple Brothers & Bobby Alu
events.description: Free outdoor Summer Sounds concert during the Ann Arbor Art Fair.

venues.name: Michigan Theater
venues.address: 603 E Liberty St, Ann Arbor, MI 48104
venues._hours_note: Check michigantheater.org directly for current film and event schedule.

venues.name: Matthaei Botanical Gardens
venues.address: 1800 N Dixboro Rd, Ann Arbor, MI 48105
venues._hours_note: Grounds open dawn to dusk. Check mbgna.umich.edu for summer conservatory hours and events.
